Add new term UBERON:9900001 (uterine fundus)

Added a new term for 'uterine fundus' as requested in issue #3637.

The term includes:
- Preferred label: 'uterine fundus'
- Synonym: 'fundus uteri' [EXACT] with reference to PMID:39112955
- Definition: 'The superior, dome-shaped portion of the uterus' with references to PMID:41204538 and PMID:40653088
- Parent classes: organ part (UBERON:0000064) and part_of uterus (UBERON:0000995)
- Proper attribution to ORCID:0000-0001-6677-8489

Closes #3637

Co-Authored-By: dragon-ai-agent
EOF
)"

input.content:
# New Term Addition: Uterine Fundus (UBERON:9900001)

## Summary
Created a new anatomical term for "uterine fundus" as requested in issue #3637, assigned ID UBERON:9900001.

## Changes Made
- Added new term UBERON:9900001 with preferred label "uterine fundus"
- Included exact synonym "fundus uteri" with reference PMID:39112955
- Added definition: "The superior, dome-shaped portion of the uterus" with supporting references PMID:41204538 and PMID:40653088
- Established proper hierarchical relationships:
  - is_a: organ part (UBERON:0000064)
  - part_of: uterus (UBERON:0000995)
  - Logical definition using intersection_of to support the hierarchical placement

## Attribution
- Contributor ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6677-8489
- Creation date: 2026-05-15
- Linked to issue tracker: https://github.com/obophenotype/uberon/issues/3637

## Validation
- Verified parent terms exist in the ontology (UBERON:0000064 and UBERON:0000995)
- Confirmed all required OBO format elements are present
- Term follows standard naming conventions and hierarchical structure

## Files Modified
- `src/ontology/uberon-edit.obo`: Added new term definition (16 lines)

Note: The file was integrated using obo-checkin.pl, which adds the term to the main ontology file. The robot converter command was not available in this environment, but the term has been properly added in valid OBO format.
